user_message: Samantha Singh at Nod Publishers just sent this. Help me triage this.

Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

signals.detail: Signal detected for Nod Publishers: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-F trap (Proposes opportunity creation prematurely); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-F failure mode (Proposes opportunity creation prematurely)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-F -- Proposes opportunity creation prematurely
